name: monday-pp-mcp
description: Operate monday.com from the terminal with a local SQLite mirror, FTS5 search, typed bulk edits, and cross-board analytics that no online tool ships.

monday_api_token.title: MONDAY_API_TOKEN
monday_api_token.description: Sets MONDAY_API_TOKEN for the monday.com MCP server. Get a credential from https://developer.monday.com/api-reference/docs/authentication.
